title: About the Clinic
intro: Stem Cell Clinic Tokyo is a clinic specializing in regenerative medicine. We offer IV drip and injection treatments using stem cell culture supernatant (exosomes), with personalized consultations and care tailored to each patient.

features.label: Free initial consultation (even if you are still considering)
All-inclusive pricing with no unexpected additional charges
First visit within 60 minutes, follow-ups within 30 minutes
1-minute walk from Ginza Station Exit A3

doctorBio: Graduated from Jinan University Faculty of Medicine in China. Licensed physician in both China and Japan. After training at Juntendo University Hospital and gaining experience in aesthetic dermatology injection treatments, Dr. Tachibana now specializes in regenerative medicine. Consultations in Chinese are available.
